LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -- DEFENDANT RANDY CROWDER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Neha Marathe, Esq. of Legal Assistance to the Eldery, 415-538-3333 for defendant and moving party Randy Crowder

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT RANDY CROWDER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT PREVAIL ON THE CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT HAS ONLY RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE CORRECT AMOUNT DUE. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
